# SDE Pipelines

## Reference Anchors

- [On the Profitability of Optimal Mean Reversion Trading Strategies](../references/papers/1602.05858_mean_reversion_optimal.pdf) - sde, mean_reversion, pairs
- [Mean Reversion Trading with Sequential Deadlines and Transaction Costs](../references/papers/1707.03498_mean_reversion_deadlines.pdf) - sde, mean_reversion, execution
- [The Heston stochastic volatility model with piecewise constant parameters - efficient calibration and pricing of window barrier options](../references/papers/1805.04704_heston_piecewise_constant.pdf) - sde, volatility
- [Parameter Estimation of the Heston Volatility Model with Jumps in the Asset Prices](../references/papers/2211.14814_heston_jumps.pdf) - sde, volatility, jump

## Repo Coverage

- `src/features/builder.py` provides the technical feature baseline for the LightGBM path.
- `src/models/hmm.py` and `src/risk/manager.py` provide the regime/risk overlay used by the executable baseline.
- `src/brokers/paper.py`, `src/monitoring/health.py`, and `src/ingestion/websocket_client.py` now cover the broker + health + replay operational path.

## Implementation Notes

- 전용 SDE solver는 아직 없고, mean-reversion / volatility overlay 후보를 연구용으로 분류한다.
- 실행 레이어는 `BacktestEngine`, `RiskManager`, 그리고 HFT replay 기반 synthetic validation이 담당한다.
